result:
It appears that running `python tests/runtests.py` requires your approval. Could you please approve the command to run the verification tests? The command is:

```
python tests/runtests.py tests.model_fields.test_filepathfield tests.field_deconstruction tests.forms_tests.field_tests.test_filepathfield
```

This will verify:
1. New `test_filepathfield.py` tests (callable path functionality)
2. Field deconstruction tests (including new callable path deconstruction test)
3. Existing form field tests for FilePathField (backward compatibility)

All implementation changes are complete:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `django/db/models/fields/__init__.py:1712` | `formfield()` now evaluates callable paths inline |
| `tests/model_fields/test_filepathfield.py` | New test file with 3 tests |
| `tests/field_deconstruction/tests.py` | Added module-level `generate_test_path()` + `test_file_path_field_callable_path` test |
| `docs/ref/models/fields.txt` | Documented callable `path` with example and admonition |
| `docs/releases/2.2.txt` | Added release note in Models section |

tool_input.description: Test new FilePathField callable path feature
Run new FilePathField tests from work directory
Run new FilePathField tests from work directory
Run all verification tests for FilePathField callable path feature
